hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" != *.env.example && "$FILE" != *.test.* ]]; then grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|ghs_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY|password["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27]|secret["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27]|api[_-]?key["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27])' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "WARNING: Potential hardcoded secret detected in $FILE — check before saving" || true; fi
